name: Impossible Bacon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grease a pie plate that is 10 x 1 1/2 inches.
3. Sprinkle the crumbled bacon, shredded Swiss cheese, and chopped onion in the pie plate.
4. Beat the remaining ingredients together for 15 seconds in a blender on high speed.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
6. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a knife inserted comes out clean. Cool for 5 minutes.
Variation:
Substitute 2 cups of fully cooked smoked ham for the bacon, cut up. For half the recipe, use 1 quart square or round casserole. Decrease onion to 2 tablespoons and divide the remaining ingredient amounts in half. Reduce blending time to 10 seconds. At high altitude, bake about 45 minutes.
